subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, Thou Who art the Sovereign of kings and the Merciful unto Thy servants! I beseech Thee by the Sun of Thy Revelation, and the Heaven of Thy grace, and the Sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا مالک الملوک و راحم المملوک اسئلک بشمس وحیک و سماء فضلک و بحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for service, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
